student.title: The Invitation
student.prompt: Your phone buzzes. A friend wants to hang out tonight. You told yourself you'd be productive.

choices.text: I go. I wasn't going to be productive anyway.
Say no, then sit on my phone for three hours instead.
Try to do both. Study at their place. Never works.
Actually stay in and get stuff done. It happens sometimes.

student.title: The Post-Exam
student.prompt: Exam's over. You're walking across campus and it finally hits you that it's done.

choices.text: Grab food. I'm starving.
Call someone and vent about it.
choices.reaction: It's either really good or really bad.

choices.text: Head to the quad and just sit for a bit.
Go back to your room and sleep.

student.title: The Food Truck
student.prompt: You leave the career fair and realize you missed lunch. There's a food truck outside with a long line.

choices.text: Get in line. I'm not going anywhere hungry.
Skip it and grab something on the way back.
Text a friend to meet me somewhere instead.
I have snacks in my bag. I came prepared.

professional.title: The Hallway
professional.prompt: The meeting ran long. You walk out and someone asks "hey, got a minute?"

choices.text: "Sure, what's up?"
"Can you walk with me? I need coffee."
"Can it wait? I've got to send something."
Keep walking. Pretend I didn't hear them.

professional.title: The Lunch Decision
professional.prompt: Nobody can decide where to go for lunch.

choices.text: I pick. Someone has to.
Throw out three options and make them choose.
"I'm fine with whatever" and mean it.
Already eating at my desk.

professional.title: The Break
professional.prompt: You step outside for a minute. Fresh air.

choices.text: Check my phone. Just a quick scroll.
Call someone. I need to hear a voice that isn't from work.
Just stand there. Don't think about anything.
Head back in. I don't have time for this.

professional.title: The Friday Ping
professional.prompt: Friday at 4:55. Someone pings you with a "quick question."

choices.text: Knock it out so it's not hanging over the weekend.
"Can this wait until Monday?"
Pretend I didn't see it.
Open it, sigh, start typing.
Meet them for a bit. I need a break anyway.
Say you're busy. Keep working.
Go, but keep thinking about the idea the whole time.
Don't respond until later.

entrepreneur.title: The Late Night
entrepreneur.prompt: You finally got it working. You step away from the laptop and realize it's 11pm.

choices.text: Keep going. I'm in the zone.
Close it down. I need sleep.
Text someone. I want to tell someone.
Just sit with it for a minute.

parent.title: The Forgotten Lunch
parent.prompt: You're driving to the grocery store. Your kid calls from school. They forgot their lunch.

choices.text: Turn around and bring it.
Tell them to figure it out today.
Call my partner and ask if they're closer.
Drop everything. Already on my way.

parent.title: The Hour
parent.prompt: Kids are finally in bed. The house is quiet again. You've got maybe an hour before you crash.

choices.text: Turn on a show. I'm done thinking.
Open my phone and scroll until I fall asleep.
Actually do something I've been wanting to do for myself.
Start on the stuff I couldn't get to during the day.

parent.title: The Grocery Run
parent.prompt: Saturday morning. You open the fridge and realize you forgot to go grocery shopping.

choices.text: Make a list and go now before it gets busy.
We're doing cereal today. Nobody's complaining.
Order groceries for delivery.
Take the kids with me. It'll be an adventure. Or a disaster.

creative.title: The Show
creative.prompt: A friend asks if you want to check out a show this weekend. Art, music, something creative.

choices.text: I'm in. I need to get out of my own head.
Can't. I'm in the middle of something.
Go, but bring a notebook. Everything is research.
Say maybe. Decide last minute like always.

creative.title: The Old Notebook
creative.prompt: You're cleaning up your space and find an old sketchbook or notebook from a while back.

choices.text: Flip through it. Some of this is actually pretty good.
Toss it in a drawer. I don't need to look back right now.
Get lost in it for an hour.
Take a picture of something in there. Might use it later.

creative.title: The Coffee Shop
creative.prompt: You grab your stuff and head to a coffee shop. You don't bring your laptop.

choices.text: Sit by the window and just watch people for a while.
Open my notebook and start doodling.
Put headphones in and listen to something new.
End up on my phone the whole time anyway.
